1:1	annotation	"@page"
1:7	identifier	"grammar.demo"
1:19	newline	"\n"
2:1	annotation	"@route"
2:8	string	"\"/demo/{slug}\""
2:22	newline	"\n"
3:1	annotation	"@layout"
3:9	identifier	"root"
3:13	comma	","
3:15	identifier	"demo"
3:19	newline	"\n"
4:1	annotation	"@render"
4:9	identifier	"action"
4:15	newline	"\n"
5:1	annotation	"@css"
5:6	identifier	"default"
5:14	identifier	"page"
5:19	identifier	"forms"
5:24	newline	"\n"
6:1	newline	"\n"
7:1	identifier	"paths"
7:7	lbrace	"{"
7:8	newline	"\n"
8:3	arrow	"=>"
8:6	lbrace	"{"
8:8	identifier	"slug"
8:12	colon	":"
8:14	string	"\"starter\""
8:24	rbrace	"}"
8:25	newline	"\n"
9:1	rbrace	"}"
9:2	newline	"\n"
10:1	newline	"\n"
11:1	identifier	"act"
11:5	identifier	"submit"
11:12	lbrace	"{"
11:13	newline	"\n"
12:3	identifier	"input"
12:9	colon	":"
12:10	text	"="
12:12	identifier	"form"
12:17	identifier	"DemoInput"
12:26	newline	"\n"
13:3	identifier	"valid"
13:8	text	"(input)"
13:15	question	"?"
13:16	newline	"\n"
14:3	text	"->"
14:6	string	"\"/demo/starter?ok=1\""
14:26	newline	"\n"
15:1	rbrace	"}"
15:2	newline	"\n"
16:1	newline	"\n"
17:1	identifier	"view"
17:6	lbrace	"{"
17:7	newline	"\n"
18:3	text	"<main>"
18:9	newline	"\n"
19:5	text	"<h1"
19:9	text	".title>"
19:16	lbrace	"{"
19:17	identifier	"slug"
19:21	rbrace	"}"
19:22	text	"</h1>"
19:27	newline	"\n"
20:5	text	"<form"
20:11	identifier	"g"
20:12	colon	":"
20:13	identifier	"post"
20:17	text	"="
20:18	lbrace	"{"
20:19	identifier	"submit"
20:25	rbrace	"}"
20:26	text	">"
20:27	newline	"\n"
21:7	text	"<button>Save</button>"
21:28	newline	"\n"
22:5	text	"</form>"
22:12	newline	"\n"
23:3	text	"</main>"
23:10	newline	"\n"
24:1	rbrace	"}"
24:2	newline	"\n"
25:1	eof	""
